name: Summarize Text with AI
description: Generate a concise, optionally translated summary of an accessible webpage URL with configurable output length through ApyHub's AI Summarize API.

auth.hint: Generate an ApyHub credential and send the token in the apy-token header. Store only the token value in Arthur MCP Secrets.

tools.name: summarize_url
tools.description: Summarize an accessible webpage or document URL and return the generated summary text.

params.name: url
params.description: Accessible webpage or supported document URL whose content should be summarized.

params.name: summary_length
params.description: Desired length: short, medium, or long; defaults to short.

params.name: output_language
params.description: Supported output language code; defaults to en.
